# PC Quanti

> Engineering and construction management consultancy delivering professional services across the full project lifecycle — from planning through execution and close-out — for nuclear and coal-fired power, mining, and infrastructure across South Africa, the United Kingdom, and other international markets.

PC Quanti is a multi-disciplinary consultancy founded in 2020, operating across NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, and JBCC contract frameworks. The team brings extensive experience in nuclear power generation, coal-fired power, oil and gas, mining, and major infrastructure developments. They provide nine professional service lines delivered by a core management team with combined experience spanning decades in engineering and construction.

## Contact

- Email: info@pcquanti.co.za
- Phone: +27 82 863 2154
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/27828632154
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/pc-quanti/

---

## Home

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/

The homepage introduces PC Quanti as an engineering and construction management consultancy available to provide services in South Africa, the United Kingdom, and other international markets. It features an overview of all nine services, key sectors served, the management core team, and frequently asked questions.

### Sectors

- **Nuclear & Coal**: Nuclear and coal-fired power generation projects
- **Oil & Gas**: Petrochemical plant projects, outage shutdown turnaround management
- **Mining**: Mining sector project delivery
- **Infrastructure**: Major infrastructure developments including airport projects and civil works

### Contract Forms

NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, JBCC

### Services Overview

Nine professional service lines: Project Management, Planning, Construction Management, Contract Administration, Contract Management, Quantity Surveying, Commercial Management, Risk Management, and Dispute Resolution — with a proven track record of delivering complex major EPC and EPCM projects.

### Trusted in High-Stakes Sectors

- **Nuclear**: Life-extension upgrades, safety-critical construction and project delivery at nuclear power stations
- **Oil & Gas**: Petrochemical plant projects, outage shutdown turnaround management
- **Infrastructure**: Major infrastructure developments including airport projects, civil works, and public capital programmes
- **Power Generation**: Nuclear and coal-fired power station projects across the full EPC and EPCM lifecycle

### How We Deliver

1. **Discovery & Alignment** — Clarify scope, constraints, and success metrics with stakeholders and delivery teams.
2. **Structured Mobilisation** — Build the right team, apply project controls, and develop reporting requirements to de-risk delivery early.
3. **Controlled Execution** — Track progress, manage change, and keep commercial outcomes protected.
4. **Closeout & Handover** — Deliver final reporting, lessons learned, and a clean transition to operations.

### Value Propositions

- **Full lifecycle**: From early concept and planning through execution, delivery and hand-over
- **Track record**: Safety-critical nuclear and other major projects in South Africa and the UK
- **Our commitment**: Delivered safely, on time and within budget — every stage of the project lifecycle

### FAQs

- **Services**: Overview of nine professional service lines available for deployment
- **Contract frameworks**: Expertise across NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, and JBCC
- **International capability**: Services delivered in South Africa, the United Kingdom, and other international markets
- **Project approach**: Disciplined, structured methodology from planning through execution
- **Professional qualifications**: Team qualifications and professional body memberships
- **Dispute resolution**: Adjudication, arbitration, and expert witness capabilities

---

## About

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/about

The About page details who PC Quanti is and what differentiates them.

### Who We Are

Multi-disciplinary consultancy founded in 2020 with experience across nuclear, coal-fired power, oil and gas, mining, and major infrastructure. Delivers professional services across the full project lifecycle.

### Differentiators

- **Structured Project Execution**: Disciplined frameworks from planning through close-out
- **Comprehensive Oversight**: Full-spectrum project, contract, and commercial management
- **Risk Management**: Proactive identification, assessment, and mitigation of project risks
- **Dispute Resolution**: Expert claims preparation, adjudication, arbitration, and negotiation

### Professional Standards

Commitment to POPIA, UK GDPR, and professional body standards. Ethical practice, accountability, and integrity underpin all engagements.

---

## Team

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/team

The management core team comprises five key leaders:

- **Phil Coleman** — Managing Director. 13 years in the UK construction industry, Group Five Nuclear Project Manager 2013–2020, founded PC Quanti in 2020. Experienced in NEC and FIDIC contracts for nuclear power, oil and gas, and infrastructure.
- **Tyrone Juul** — Project, Construction & Contract Management. 23+ years experience, mechanical engineering background, NEC/FIDIC specialist. Led multi-billion rand projects in nuclear, petrochemical, and infrastructure sectors.
- **Heleene Schreuder** — Legal. Admitted attorney with 15+ years in civil and commercial litigation, Fellow of the Association of Arbitrators of Southern Africa (AASA). Specialises in construction law, contract disputes, and adjudication/arbitration.
- **Francois Venter** — Planning. 30-year career spanning nuclear, oil and gas, and major infrastructure. Primavera P6 specialist with expertise in CPM scheduling, forensic delay analysis, earned value management, and Monte Carlo simulation.
- **Jonathan Ely** — Adjudication & Arbitration. 45+ years experience, BSc Civil Engineering and LLB. Accredited arbitrator and adjudicator with deep expertise in NEC, FIDIC, and GCC dispute resolution.

---

## Services Overview

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services

Index page listing all nine professional service lines. PC Quanti has extensive experience in various forms of contract including NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, JBCC and deploys services in project management, planning, construction management, quantity surveying, cost, value and risk management, contract and commercial management, dispute resolution, adjudication and arbitration, with a proven track record of delivering complex major EPC and EPCM projects.

---

## Project Management

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/project-management

Comprehensive project management from initial design and engineering through on-site execution and close-out. Can bolster existing project teams or provide full client-side project management capability. Integrates programme management frameworks incorporating schedule development, risk management, change control, and stakeholder interface management — including plant outage and shutdown delivery for nuclear and industrial sectors with 24/7 scheduling.

### Typical Deliverables

**Project Planning & Setup:**
- Project execution plans and governance frameworks
- Stakeholder engagement and communication strategies
- Risk registers and mitigation planning
- Resource mobilisation and team setup

**Delivery & Controls:**
- Progress monitoring and schedule management
- Cost management and change control
- Quality assurance oversight
- Interface management across disciplines

**Commissioning Support:**
- Commissioning strategies and planning
- Systems integration and testing coordination
- Handover documentation and lessons learned
- Operational readiness reviews

**Compliance & Reporting:**
- Regulatory compliance monitoring
- Board and stakeholder reporting
- Audit support and documentation
- Milestone tracking and programme dashboards

### Key Capabilities

- Programme Management (integrating schedule, risk, change control, stakeholder management)
- Outage & Shutdown PM (24/7 scheduling, critical path management)
- Main Contractor / Subcontractor Management (oversight, coordination, performance management)

### Sectors

- Power Generation (nuclear, coal-fired)
- Oil & Gas (petrochemical plant projects)
- Major Infrastructure (airports, civil structures, mechanical/electrical installations)

### Related Services

Planning, Quantity Surveying

---

## Planning

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/planning

Structured and strategic planning services on NEC, FIDIC, and GCC contracts. Strategic planning foundation enables active management and supports extension of time claims. Covers critical path scheduling, earned value management, resource loading, forensic delay analysis, look-ahead programmes, and outage and shutdown scheduling for complex engineering environments including nuclear and coal-fired power generation, oil and gas, and other industrial and commercial environments.

### Typical Deliverables

**Planning & Scheduling:**
- Baseline programme development and CPM analysis
- Resource loading and levelling
- Look-ahead schedules and progress reporting
- Risk-adjusted scheduling and S-curve tracking
- Earned value tracking and performance measurement

**Outage & Shutdown Planning:**
- Critical path outage programmes
- Readiness reviews and pre-shutdown planning
- 24/7 schedule management during outages
- Engineering, procurement, and construction coordination

**Project Controls:**
- Cost baseline and budget forecasting
- Earned value management (BCWS, BCWP, ACWP)
- Variance analysis and performance reporting
- Data tracking and programme dashboards

**Forensic Delay Analysis:**
- Windows analysis
- As-planned vs. as-built comparison
- Collapsed as-built analysis
- Impacted as-planned methodology
- Extension of time claim support

### Key Capabilities

- Integrated Systems (Primavera P6, earned value management systems)
- Industry Standards (PMI, AACE, GAO 16-89G compliance)
- Expert Analysis (CPM, EVM, Monte Carlo simulation, forensic delay techniques)

### Methodologies

GAO 16-89G scheduling standards, Critical Path Method, earned value management, windows analysis, as-planned vs. as-built comparison, collapsed as-built, impacted as-planned.

### Tools

Primavera P6, Monte Carlo simulation.

### Related Services

Project Management, Construction Management

---

## Construction Management

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/construction-management

Proven track record of delivering complex projects in the most challenging environments — managing multidisciplinary project execution across operational facilities and major capital programmes. Manages client, main contractor, or subcontractor activities including outage and shutdown construction, coordinating engineering, procurement, and construction to meet timeframe and budget targets. Specialist outage and shutdown execution with 24/7 operations management in live industrial environments.

### Typical Deliverables

**Site Execution Management:**
- Main contractor and subcontractor oversight
- Multidisciplinary coordination (civil, structural, mechanical, electrical, instrumentation)
- Safety and HSE management
- Quality assurance and inspection coordination

**Outage & Shutdown Management:**
- Plant shutdown execution planning and management
- 24/7 operations and resource management
- Readiness reviews and pre-shutdown preparation
- Stakeholder management and communication

**Progress & Reporting:**
- Construction progress monitoring and reporting
- Resource tracking and allocation
- Look-ahead schedules and constraint management
- Issue escalation and resolution

**Commissioning & Handover:**
- Operational readiness assessments
- Pre-commissioning and testing coordination
- Systems completion and punch list management
- Handover documentation and close-out

### Key Capabilities

- High-Consequence Environments (nuclear, petrochemical, oil and gas, airports, stadia, infrastructure)
- Multidisciplinary Integration (civil, structural, mechanical, electrical, instrumentation)
- Outage Expertise (24/7 operations management, tight deadlines, operational constraints)

### Sectors

Nuclear and plant major projects and maintenance, petrochemical, oil and gas, airport projects, stadia, infrastructure.

### Geographic Focus

South Africa, United Kingdom, and other international markets.

### Related Services

Project Management, Planning

---

## Contract Administration

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/contract-administration

Expert contract administration ensuring timely contractual notices, structured reporting, and disciplined commercial administration across nuclear, mining, and industrial sectors. Operates across NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, and JBCC contract frameworks. Proactive and detail-driven approach with focus on clear contemporaneous record keeping. Proper and effective contract administration is critical for project success — mitigating risk and reducing the likelihood of disputes.

### Typical Deliverables

**Contract Administration:**
- Contract setup and mobilisation
- Notice management, including third-party and subcontractor notices
- Variation management
- Payment certification
- Contract close-out
- Ensuring clear contemporaneous record keeping

**Documentation Control:**
- Correspondence registers and tracking
- Meeting minutes and action management
- Version control and document management
- As-built documentation

**Compliance & Reporting:**
- Regulatory monitoring and compliance
- Milestone tracking and performance dashboards
- Audit trails and documentation standards
- Progress and commercial reporting

**Risk & Issue Management:**
- Risk registers and early warning systems
- Dispute avoidance strategies
- Issue tracking and resolution
- Lessons learned documentation

### Key Capabilities

- Contractual Expertise (deep knowledge of NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, JBCC, and bespoke forms)
- Compliance Rigour (meticulous tracking, documentation standards, audit readiness)
- Practical Focus (contractual discipline with pragmatic delivery and collaboration)
- Sector Experience (nuclear, mining, industrial sectors)

### Related Services

Quantity Surveying, Dispute Resolution

---

## Contract Management

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/contract-management

Comprehensive contract lifecycle support from pre-award through final account. Advisory on compliance, risk allocation, payment certification, variation management, and extension of time assessments across all major forms of procurement. When integrated with quantity surveying and contract administration, provides a fully coordinated commercial team. Provides strategic protection of commercial rights and contemporaneous record keeping, ensuring enforceable contractual positions are maintained throughout the project lifecycle.

### Typical Deliverables

**Pre-Award Advisory:**
- Contract form selection and review
- Risk allocation review and negotiation support
- Tender review and evaluation
- Pre-contract risk assessment

**Contract Execution:**
- Contract compliance, risk allocation, and monitoring
- Payment certification and payment processes
- Variation management and valuations
- Extension of time assessment
- Insurance covers, bonds and guarantees management

**Change Management:**
- Variation registers and change order preparation
- Impact assessment and notice management
- Team member assessments and variation assessments
- Oversight of works-in-progress administration

**Final Account & Close-Out:**
- Final account preparation and agreement
- Commercial reporting and reconciliation
- Retention management and release
- Post-project review and lessons learned

### Key Capabilities

- Multi-Form Expertise (NEC3, NEC4, FIDIC, GCC, JBCC)
- Commercial Protection (proactive risk identification, contractual rights preservation, contemporaneous record keeping)
- Integrated Approach (coordinates with contract administration and quantity surveying for full commercial oversight)

### Related Services

Contract Administration, Quantity Surveying

---

## Quantity Surveying

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/quantity-surveying

Detailed quantity surveying from measuring and quantification, bill of quantities preparation, performance and variations analysis, and claims management. Services extend from compensation event assessment through certification and payment management — dovetailing with contract administration and management to ensure value is maintained. Supports dispute and arbitration proceedings with rigorous commercial evidence. Full commercial management from feasibility through close-out.

### Typical Deliverables

**Measuring & Quantification:**
- Detailed measuring and quantification
- Bill of quantities (BoQ) preparation
- Pre-tender cost estimates
- Budget forecasting

**Procurement Support:**
- Tender documentation preparation
- Bid evaluation and analysis
- Negotiation support
- Award recommendations

**Performance & Variations Analysis:**
- Variations analysis and assessment
- Interim valuations and remeasurements
- Contractual review and compliance
- Cost reporting and forecasting

**Claims & Dispute Support:**
- Claims management and preparation
- Dispute and arbitration support with commercial evidence
- Final account preparation and agreement
- Financial close-out

### Key Capabilities

- Cost & Value Management (project cost and value management, project cost reporting, and forecasting through final account)
- Contractual Review & Support (NEC, FIDIC, and bespoke forms, variation management, claims management)
- Commercial Monitoring & Risk Management (project commercial monitoring, risk management, practical industry understanding)

### Related Services

Contract Administration, Planning

---

## Commercial Management

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/commercial-management

Full project commercial oversight provided by specialist individuals with deep expertise across the complete commercial lifecycle. Integrated oversight covering procurement strategy, estimating, tender analysis, cost control, risk management, design development, and value engineering to protect and enhance commercial outcomes across the project lifecycle. Combines technical rigour with commercial pragmatism, identifying value engineering opportunities while protecting against commercial exposure.

### Typical Deliverables

**Procurement & Estimating:**
- Procurement strategy development
- Cost estimating and benchmarking
- Tender preparation and management
- Tender analysis and evaluation
- Detailed contract review and optimisation

**Cost & Value Management:**
- Cost planning and control
- Value engineering (design development and procurement opportunities)
- Cost benchmarking and analysis
- Life cycle cost assessment
- Whole life cost analysis

**Risk & Commercial Oversight:**
- Commercial risk identification and assessment
- Risk registers and mitigation strategies
- Commercial reporting and forecasting
- Cash flow analysis and management

**Design Development Support:**
- Concept and feasibility cost estimates
- Design monitoring and cost tracking
- Elemental cost plans
- Cost-in-use analysis

### Key Capabilities

- End-to-End Oversight (from inception through close-out across the full commercial lifecycle)
- Value Engineering (identifying opportunities during design development and procurement)
- Sector Experience (nuclear, petrochemical, mining, major infrastructure)

### Related Services — QS Cross-Reference

Detailed cost management, valuations and remeasurements, escalation calculations, and payment process management — coordinated with Quantity Surveying for comprehensive commercial coverage.

### Related Services

Quantity Surveying, Contract Management

### Geographic Focus

South Africa, United Kingdom, and other international markets.

---

## Risk Management

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/risk-management

Specialised risk management tailored to the construction and engineering sector. Helps clients identify, assess, and mitigate risks before they impact delivery. From feasibility and cost exposure analysis to contractual, operational, and site-based risk evaluation — protects commercial interests through rigorous project controls. Enables clients to minimise financial loss, manage uncertainty effectively, and deliver with greater confidence. Minimises delays, cost overruns, and performance disputes.

### Typical Deliverables

**Risk Identification & Assessment:**
- Comprehensive risk registers
- Qualitative and quantitative risk analysis
- Probability and impact assessment
- Risk categorisation and prioritisation

**Mitigation Planning:**
- Response strategies (avoid, transfer, mitigate, accept)
- Contingency planning and allocation
- Action plans and ownership assignment
- Early warning indicators and triggers

**Monitoring & Control:**
- Regular risk reviews and updates
- Risk dashboards and reporting
- Emerging risk identification
- Mitigation effectiveness tracking

**Specialised Risk Analysis:**
- Schedule risk analysis (Monte Carlo simulation)
- Cost risk modelling and forecasting
- Safety and regulatory risk assessment
- Stakeholder and reputational risk analysis

### Key Risk Areas

- **Technical Risks**: Design complexity, technology maturity, interface management
- **Commercial Risks**: Contracts, procurement, supply chain, cost escalation, claims exposure
- **Regulatory & Compliance**: Licensing, regulatory changes, safety cases, compliance requirements

### Related Services

Planning, Project Management

---

## Dispute Resolution

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/services/dispute-resolution

Primary focus on dispute avoidance through strong planning and contract administration. When disputes are unavoidable, provides specialist advice and representation across all dispute resolution forums, including claims preparation, adjudication, arbitration, and negotiation to achieve efficient and preferable outcomes. Strategic and practical guidance on contractual dispute resolution procedures, evidentiary preparation, and expert coordination. Assists with formulation and presentation of claims, prepares statements of claim, defence, and counterclaims for adjudication and arbitration proceedings. Supports and leads dispute resolution negotiations and drafts enforceable settlements.

### Typical Deliverables

**Claims Preparation:**
- Delay and disruption claims
- Prolongation cost analysis
- Variation and change order claims
- Loss and expense assessment

**Claims Assessment:**
- Contractor claim evaluation
- Quantum and entitlement analysis
- Independent cost verification
- Commercial risk assessment

**Dispute Resolution Support:**
- Expert witness reports and testimony
- Adjudication and arbitration support (from referral through to award)
- Mediation preparation and representation
- Settlement negotiation and drafting
- Statements of claim, defence, and counterclaim

**Forensic Analysis:**
- Critical path delay analysis
- Programme impact assessment
- Cost causation analysis
- Document forensics and evidence compilation

### Key Capabilities

- Forensic Rigour (detailed analysis of records, programmes, and costs)
- Commercial Awareness (pragmatic approach balancing entitlements with commercial realities)
- Industry Experience (nuclear, mining, industrial sectors, and major infrastructure)

### Related Services

Contract Administration, Planning

---

## Projects

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/projects

Two landmark case studies from Koeberg Nuclear Power Station, South Africa:

### PTR Tanks Project

20-Year Life Extension — Koeberg Nuclear Power Station

- **Sector:** Nuclear Power Generation
- **Contract:** NEC Option A
- **Location:** Koeberg, South Africa
- **Services:** Project Management, Contract Administration, Construction Oversight, Planning & Scheduling

**Challenge:** Two new borated water storage tanks required as part of the 20-year life extension programme, delivered within strict nuclear quality assurance standards in a live nuclear power station environment.

**Delivery:** End-to-end project management and NEC Option A contract administration from design development through on-site construction and commissioning. Each tank fabricated in SAF2205 Duplex Stainless Steel to ASME III code standards with 100% radiographic weld examination. Installation involved deployment of a 500-ton crawler crane for lifting operations with complex integration of piping and services into existing plant systems.

**Outcome:** Successfully delivered within the nuclear quality assurance framework, contributing to Koeberg's continued safe operation. Structured contract administration and programme planning ensured milestones were met within the constraints of the nuclear environment.

### Steam Generator Replacement (KNPS)

20-Year Life Extension — Koeberg Nuclear Power Station

- **Sector:** Nuclear Power Generation
- **Contract:** NEC3 Option A
- **Location:** Koeberg, South Africa
- **Services:** NEC Option A, Project Management, Contract Administration, Construction Oversight, Planning & Scheduling, Quantity Surveying, Commercial Management, Construction Management, Risk Management

**Challenge:** Replacing six steam generators — three per operating unit, each weighing approximately 350 tons — required meticulous multi-year coordination of site implementation phase across heavy transport, rigging, and nuclear quality installation within live plant and outage windows.

**Delivery:** PC Quanti provided comprehensive project management and NEC3 Option A contract and construction management to the plant OEM, throughout the complete implementation phase. Services included subcontractor coordination across multiple specialist firms, detailed outage scheduling for precision welding operations, and ongoing project controls and planning to maintain programme integrity against stringent nuclear safety and quality standards.

**Outcome:** The Steam Generator Replacement was completed as a critical enabler of Koeberg's 20-year life extension — one of the most technically complex projects undertaken at the station. PC Quanti's structured approach to contract management, risk identification, and planning as an integrated delivery team, within the required quality, safety, cost, and schedule parameters.

### In the News

Koeberg Unit 2 achieved 365 consecutive days of uninterrupted operation at 946 MW with a 99.4% energy availability factor (EAF), following the completion of its steam generator replacement. The client publicly praised the quality of the steam generator installation. PC Quanti provided project management, contract administration, and contract management services throughout the implementation programme, to the OEM, contributing directly to this major milestone in Koeberg's 20-year lifecycle extension programme. Reported by Engineering News on 10 March 2026.

## Legal Pages

### Privacy Policy

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/privacy-policy

Effective 11 March 2026. Compliant with POPIA (South Africa) and UK GDPR. Covers information collection, processing purposes, legal basis, data sharing, cross-border transfers, retention, cookies, security measures, and data subject rights.

### Terms & Conditions

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/terms-conditions

Effective 11 March 2025. Governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa, with variations for UK and international engagements. Covers website use, professional services, intellectual property, liability limitations, ECTA compliance, and contact form terms.

### Disclaimer

URL: https://pcquanti.co.za/disclaimer

Effective 11 March 2026. Professional services disclaimer covering general information only, no warranties, limitation of liability, project descriptions, third-party links, intellectual property, professional standards, and indemnification.
